sentences.arabic: أَحَسَّ وَلِيدٌ بِأَلَمٍ فِي حَلْقِهِ مُنْذُ الصَّبَاحِ.
sentences.translation: Walid je od jutra osjećao bol u grlu.
sentences.translationEn: Walid felt throat pain since the morning.

sentences.arabic: شَرِبَ عَصِيرَ الْلَّيْمُونِ مَعَ الْعَسَلِ لِيَتَحَسَّنَ.
sentences.translation: Popio je sok od limuna s medom da mu bude bolje.
sentences.translationEn: He drank lemon juice with honey to get better.

sentences.arabic: بَقِيَ فِي الْبَيْتِ وَلَمْ يَذْهَبْ إِلَى الْعَمَلِ.
sentences.translation: Ostao je kod kuće i nije otišao na posao.
sentences.translationEn: He stayed at home and did not go to work.

sentences.arabic: فِي الْمَسَاءِ ذَهَبَ إِلَى الطَّبِيبِ لِأَنَّ الْأَلَمَ اشْتَدَّ.
sentences.translation: Uveče je otišao kod ljekara jer se bol pojačala.
sentences.translationEn: In the evening he went to the doctor because the pain got worse.
